description: Correct stale apps/ and src/data/roadmap path references across four orchestrator skills after the apps/→packages/ monorepo rename, and add an evals/probes guard so the bug class cannot silently reappear (closes #69).

userStories.title: Fix harness-audit/SKILL.md stale paths
userStories.description: As an operator running /harness-audit, I want the skill to reference packages/docs/ so the docs-app context gather and the test-coverage / package-health checks actually run instead of silently no-oping.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/docs/package.json -> packages/docs/package.json on the context-gather command, preserving the /home/sandbox/harness/ absolute prefix
apps/docs: snapshot-template label -> packages/docs:
Both apps/docs/ occurrences on the Implementer auditor prompt line -> packages/docs/ (global, not first-match)
apps/*/package.json -> packages/*/package.json
Key Paths table 'Docs app' row -> packages/docs/
grep -nE 'apps/docs|apps/\*' .claude/skills/harness-audit/SKILL.md returns zero matches
packages/docs/src/__tests__/ token-swap is intentional even though the dir does not exist (2>/dev/null-guarded probe); fixing the probe logic is out of scope

userStories.title: Fix strategic-proposal/SKILL.md stale paths
userStories.description: As an operator running /strategic-proposal, I want the skill to name its real roadmap write target so the run doesn't target a non-existent src/data/roadmap.ts or self-contradict.
acceptanceCriteria: Both src/data/roadmap.ts occurrences (intro prose line 13 + mermaid node line 57) -> docs/roadmap.md, matching the skill's own §9 write logic
apps/docs/ (key-paths/structure reference line 78) -> packages/docs/
Line-6 '/roadmap page data' prose is left unchanged (not a file path)
The mermaid block still parses (node label is valid after the swap)
grep -nE 'apps/docs|src/data/roadmap' .claude/skills/strategic-proposal/SKILL.md returns zero matches

userStories.title: Fix ci-status/SKILL.md docs.yml trigger doc
userStories.description: As an operator reading /ci-status, I want the documented docs.yml trigger paths to match the real workflow filter.
acceptanceCriteria: The docs.yml trigger list 'docs/**, apps/docs/**, blog/**' is replaced atomically with 'packages/docs/**, docs/**, blog/**' (a reorder + token swap, matching .github/workflows/docs.yml), 'itself' suffix preserved
grep -n 'apps/docs' .claude/skills/ci-status/SKILL.md returns zero matches

userStories.title: Fix harness-context/SKILL.md stale README path
userStories.description: As an operator reading /harness-context, I want the cited README path to point at the file that exists.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/README.md -> packages/README.md (line 22)
grep -n 'apps/README' .claude/skills/harness-context/SKILL.md returns zero matches

userStories.title: Repo-wide verification gate
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a single command proving no stale path references remain across all skills.
acceptanceCriteria: grep -rnE 'apps/docs|apps/README|apps/\*|src/data/roadmap' .claude/skills/ returns zero matches (pattern broadened to include the apps/* wildcard per critic findings)
/eval probe suite shows no NEW (green->red) regression vs the base

userStories.title: Add a regression guard to evals/probes/skill-paths.sh (critic-driven)
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want skill-paths.sh to guard the just-fixed tokens so a future PR cannot reintroduce them silently (the PR #44 failure mode), and so US-005's /eval criterion is no longer vacuous.
acceptanceCriteria: evals/probes/skill-paths.sh greps .claude/skills/ for 'apps/docs|apps/README|apps/\*|src/data/roadmap' and exits 1 (REGRESSION) on any hit; exits 0 (PASS) when clean
The stale comment claiming apps/docs/ 'has legitimate or intentional uses in other skills' is replaced (the rename is complete)
The existing docs/wiki/ + workspace/heartbeats/ guard and the harness-context/SKILL.md full-path exclusion are preserved
bash evals/probes/skill-paths.sh exits 0 (GREEN) after US-001..US-004 land
evals/ is harness-infra and not named in this PRD's Non-Goals
